Level of animation detail for flags to use. Only applies to flag blocks and flag standards.
config.betsyross.server.armorBannerMaxHe: Maximum height allowed when setting an armor banner. Set to 0 to disable the maximum limit.
config.betsyross.server.armorBannerMaxWi: Maximum width allowed when setting an armor banner. Set to 0 to disable the maximum limit.
config.betsyross.server.bannerStandardMa: Maximum height allowed when setting a banner standard. Set to 0 to disable the maximum limit.
Maximum width allowed when setting a banner standard. Set to 0 to disable the maximum limit.
config.betsyross.server.flagBlockMaxHeig: Maximum height allowed when setting a flag block. Set to 0 to disable the maximum limit.
config.betsyross.server.flagBlockMaxWidt: Maximum width allowed when setting a flag block. Set to 0 to disable the maximum limit.
config.betsyross.server.flagStandardMaxH: Maximum height allowed when setting a flag standard. Set to 0 to disable the maximum limit.
config.betsyross.server.flagStandardMaxW: Maximum width allowed when setting a flag standard. Set to 0 to disable the maximum limit.
gui.betsyross.embroidery_table.invalid_f: Set this flag in-world and not in the Embroidery Table
gui.betsyross.embroidery_table.invalid_i: You can only open the Embroidery Table with an item-only flag
gui.betsyross.flag_maker.too_tall: Flag cannot exceed %s blocks in height
gui.betsyross.flag_maker.too_wide: Flag cannot exceed %s blocks in width
